creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->ohauer

I'll take it. 

To submitter: 
I don't see a reason to have Severity at serious and  
Priority at medium for new port. 

Maybe read some documents? 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/problem-reports/
